name: Summize Contract Intelligence API
what_it_does: Summize AI-powered contract review and lifecycle management REST API for automated contract analysis, risk identification, and obligation extraction. Enables AI agents to manage AI-assisted contract review and risk clause flagging for legal operations automation, handle contract upload and instant summary generation for rapid contract intelligence, access obligation and key term extraction for compliance tracking automation, retrieve contract comparison and deviation flagging against standard playbook for risk assessment, manage contract repository and metadata organization for legal portfolio management, handle contract workflow and approval routing for execution process management, access analytics and reporting on contract portfolio risk for legal intelligence, retrieve negotiation support data and clause alternatives for contract optimization, manage contract template standardization and clause library for consistent drafting, and integrate Summize with Microsoft 365, Salesforce, and legal platforms.
use_cases: Reviewing contracts from legal operations agents
Extracting obligations from compliance tracking agents
Flagging contract risks from legal risk agents
Summarizing contracts from deal intelligence agents
not_for: Full CLM with complex multi-party negotiation (use Ironclad)
High-volume regulatory document review (use specialized regulatory platforms)
Consumer legal services at individual scale
best_when: An in-house legal team, law firm, or business operations team wanting AI agents to automate contract review, risk clause identification, obligation extraction, playbook comparison, and contract intelligence to accelerate deal velocity.
avoid_when: AI EXTRACTION ACCURACY FOR HIGH-STAKES CONTRACTS: Automated contract obligation extraction and risk flagging using AI must be validated by qualified legal reviewer for high-value or high-risk agreements; automated AI extraction errors on M&A, financing, or regulatory contracts create missed obligation and breach risk. Attorney review responsibility — automated AI contract review output must be treated as preliminary screening, not legal advice; automated deployment of AI risk flags as definitive legal positions without attorney review creates professional responsibility and client liability issues. Confidentiality of contract data — automated contract upload to Summize AI processing must comply with client confidentiality obligations; law firm automated upload of client contracts to Summize requires client consent for data processing by third-party AI. Model accuracy jurisdiction variance — Summize AI contract review may perform differently across jurisdictions and contract types; automated review of non-English or civil law jurisdiction contracts may produce lower accuracy risk identification than common law English contracts.

auth.notes: Summize uses OAuth 2.0 with scopes. REST API with JSON. Manchester, UK HQ. Founded 2018. Private (VC-backed, Notion Capital/Praetura). AI-native contract review and CLM. Microsoft Teams and M365 native integration. Competes with Evisort (Workday), LexCheck, and ContractPodAi for AI contract review.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-user annual subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription; team and enterprise tiers based on user count and contract volume
pricing.notes: Manchester UK. Notion Capital/Praetura VC. Founded 2018. AI-native CLM. Microsoft Teams native. Per-user annual subscription. GDPR-compliant UK HQ.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; AI processing latency depends on contract length and complexity; documented per tier

known_agent_gotchas: AI CONTRACT REVIEW LATENCY FOR COMPLEX CONTRACTS: Summize AI processing for long or complex contracts (100+ pages) may take 30-120 seconds; automated workflows must implement async processing with polling or webhook callback rather than synchronous contract review requests

AI EXTRACTION VALIDATION FOR HIGH-STAKES AGREEMENTS: Automated obligation and risk extraction from M&A, financing, or high-value commercial contracts must route to attorney review before action; automated extraction errors on complex agreements create missed obligation and breach risk

Client confidentiality for law firm use — automated law firm contract upload to Summize must obtain client consent for third-party AI data processing; attorney-client confidentiality obligations may restrict automated cloud upload without client authorization

Playbook deviation false positive rate — automated playbook comparison may flag standard market positions as deviations if playbook is not calibrated to specific deal type or jurisdiction; implement playbook variant management for different contract types before automated deviation flagging

Non-English contract accuracy — Summize AI review performance is optimized for English-language common law contracts; automated review of civil law jurisdiction or non-English contracts may produce lower accuracy risk identification; require manual review for non-English agreements

Webhook delivery for review completion — Summize AI review completion webhook must implement retry and idempotent downstream action; duplicate completion event delivery can trigger duplicate obligation creation in CLM system
agent_readiness.security_notes: AI contract review. GDPR, SOC2. OAuth2 with scopes. UK/EU/US. Contract terms and legal data processed by AI.

security_score_components.security_notes: AI contract intelligence. GDPR, SOC2. OAuth2 with scopes. UK/EU/US. Contract content and legal data.
